module.name: step
module.purpose: Owns the server runtime Step type as a top-level server module and hosts the execution and relay submodules. Step holds a shared Arc<TaskState>, protocol StepId-backed step identity, update sequencing, and Step::from_draft conversion from flat model StepDraft values into runtime StepKind values; owns task-step routing, initial and analysis PlanDraft creation, plan-event emission, model-prompt rendering, and step/model completion handling; model completion parses JSON objects, handles Answer objects first by forwarding the final Succeed status through the task event sender, and deserializes PlanDraft directly with serde_json; and execution spawning is delegated to the ExecutionHub in the execution submodule.

childModules.name: execution
childModules.purpose: Owns server-side execution tracking: Execution values keyed by ExecutionSignature that accumulate ordered output and finalize on the expected update count, and an ExecutionHub holding a Mutex<HashMap<ExecutionSignature, Execution>> that spawns execution steps, routes Update/Succeed events, and emits StepEvent::Complete to the step layer on completion while reporting per-signature status.

childModules.name: relay
childModules.purpose: Owns server-side relay tracking mirroring the execution submodule with panic-stub placeholders: Relay values keyed by RelaySignature and a RelayHub holding a Mutex<HashMap<RelaySignature, Relay>>, intended to spawn relay steps, route RelayEvent updates, and report per-signature status.
